ItacAcademyItem.Name: Informi (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Pasquale Castorina and Alessio Narbone date the foundation of the Informi academy to 1672. See Alessio Narbone, Bibliografia Sicola Sistematica, Palermo, 1850; Pasquale Castorina, Catania e Dante Alighieri, Catania, 1883 (British Library Shelmark: General Reference Collection lsidyv363fd6f1)
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
